PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Giles Emrie for Kay Robinson and Ola Robinson (Petitioners).

Mr. Emrie presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the holographic will. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Continued To Jul-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
